square.details2:
A smooth blend of tropical cocktails,
and unforgettable vibes. Sip handcrafted mojitos 
while the city’s hottest DJs set the mood with 
all night long. Cool drinks, beautiful people, 
and a stylish atmosphere 
— the perfect way to start the week.
square.leftRail: Afrobeats, Hip Hop, R&B, island-inspired sounds

A smooth blend of tropical 
cocktails, and unforgettable 
vibes. Sip handcrafted mojitos 
while the city’s hottest DJs set the 
mood all night long. Cool drinks, 
beautiful people, and a stylish 
atmosphere 

— the perfect way to start 
the week.
